revision.comment: [[WP:AES|←]]Created page with '.locmap .od { position: absolute; } .locmap .id { position: absolute; line-height: 0; } .locmap .l0 { font-size: 0%; position: absolute; } .locmap .pv {...'

Protected "[[Template:Location map/styles.css]]": [[WP:High-risk templates|Highly visible template]] ([Edit=Require template editor access] (indefinite) [Move=Require template editor access] (indefinite))
Removing protection templates from unprotected page ([[User:MusikBot II/FixPP/FAQ|more info]])
make it more clear what's what

Protected "[[Module:Location map/styles.css]]": [[WP:High-risk templates|Highly visible template]]: match parent ([Edit=Require template editor access] (indefinite) [Move=Require template editor access] (indefinite))
Slightly tweak map theme for accessibility (black/blue text on white labels) and grayscale map
19 revisions imported from [[:wikipedia:Module:Location_map/styles.css]]: Import just to get the source
Bot: Reverting edits from past 90 minutes

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was 1 revision imported: re-importing and overwriting due to the weird script failure
